runTitle: Vercel Production QA - Core/Auth/AI Sidebar Smoke Validation (Deployed SHA 8bf843ad1, Usage Checked)

expertAssessments.rationale: The deployed production build preserved guest entry, login CTA, AI sidebar open/input/starter prompts/ESC flow, and core API responsiveness after the push.
The Vercel production alias was confirmed on commit 8bf843ad1 in READY state, and usage review did not show an unexpected billed overage spike during this release validation window.
The same stable Playwright production config and core/auth/sidebar smoke pack passed again on the deployed SHA, providing post-deploy regression confirmation.

usageChecks.summary: Vercel production deployment for commit 8bf843ad12719f66d6864eebc6284586f396a1eb was READY, and billing usage review showed no meaningful billed overage spike during this QA window. Current billing-period effectiveCost is about USD 14.62, while billedCost remains effectively zero.
usageChecks.evidence: XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp vercel usage --format json --non-interactive; XDG_CACHE_HOME=/tmp vercel usage --breakdown daily --format json --non-interactive; mcp__vercel__getDeployments(app=openmanager-ai,target=production,limit=2)

notes: Covered surfaces: landing, login, 404, health/version/server APIs, guest session creation, dashboard AI sidebar open/input/starter prompts/ESC close.
Post-deploy smoke on production alias passed: 15 passed (2.4m).
Usage review summary: effectiveCost USD 14.6154, billedCost approximately zero, no obvious QA-induced overage spike observed in the current billing period.
